final:
module SRAM_8bit (
    input wire [7:0] D_IN,
    input wire WE,
    input wire CS,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg [7:0] D_OUT
);
    reg [7:0] obf_memory;

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        if (!CS) begin
            if (WE) begin
                obf_memory <= D_IN;  // Write data to obf_memory
            end
            D_OUT <= obf_memory; // Output the obf_memory contents
        end
    end
endmodule
